Our Story

Bringing Government Services Closer to You

Akash CSC Centre is a government-authorised Common Service Centre (CSC) located in Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West. We are committed to bridging the gap between citizens and digital government services — making them accessible, reliable, and transparent for everyone in our community.

As a certified Village Level Entrepreneur (VLE) under the CSC scheme of MeitY, we serve residents across Greater Noida West, helping them access critical government schemes without travelling to distant offices.

"Our mission is simple — make every government service accessible to every citizen, with honesty, efficiency, and care."
  • ✓Certified & Authorised — Government-recognised VLE with SBI BC, RAP, and insurance certifications.
  • ✓Transparent Service — No hidden charges. Official government service fees only.
  • ✓Community First — Dedicated to helping citizens of Greater Noida West navigate digital services.
  • ✓End-to-End Help — From application to completion, we guide you through every step.

Our Certifications & Authorisations

Every service we offer is backed by official government authorisation, ensuring legitimate, secure, and reliable delivery.

All Services at Akash CSC Centre

Government-authorised, transparent, and reliable. All services processed through official government portals.

Banking

SBI Banking Services

🏦

Account Opening

Open SBI savings or Jan Dhan account with minimal documentation as a certified SBI Business Correspondent.

SBI BC
Open a zero-balance Jan Dhan account or a regular SBI savings account. Documents needed: Aadhaar card, PAN or Form 60, one passport photo, and mobile number.
Enquire on WhatsApp
💸

Cash Deposit & Withdrawal

Deposit or withdraw cash from your SBI account through our BC point — no branch visit needed.

SBI BC
Deposit or withdraw cash from your SBI account using our AEPS-enabled BC point. Bring your Aadhaar card and registered mobile number. Daily limits apply as per SBI norms.
Enquire on WhatsApp
💳

Balance Enquiry & Mini Statement

Check your balance and get a mini statement of recent transactions instantly.

SBI BC
Instant balance check and last 5 transactions mini-statement for your SBI account. Bring your Aadhaar card linked to your bank account.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🔄

Fund Transfer (AEPS)

Transfer money to any bank using Aadhaar-enabled payment services with biometric authentication.

AEPS
Transfer funds to any bank account using Aadhaar Enabled Payment System (AEPS). Requires biometric fingerprint verification. No debit card needed — just your Aadhaar.
Enquire on WhatsApp

Life Insurance

Certified Agent

Health Insurance

Personal and family health insurance covering hospitalisation, critical illness and medical expenses.

Certified Agent

🚗

General Insurance

Vehicle insurance, travel insurance and other general insurance products.

Certified Agent

🌾

PMFBY (Crop Insurance)

Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana — crop insurance for farmers against natural calamities.

PM Scheme
Crop insurance for Kharif and Rabi seasons. Protects against drought, flood, pest attack, and other natural calamities. Subsidised premium for farmers. Land records required.

Health Schemes

Ayushman Bharat (PMJAY)

🏥

Ayushman Card Registration

Register for PM-JAY and get your Ayushman Bharat health card — up to ₹5 lakh coverage per year.

PM-JAY
Free registration for eligible families under PMJAY scheme. Covers hospitalisation costs up to ₹5 lakh per year at empanelled government and private hospitals. Bring Aadhaar + ration card.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🃏

Health Card Generation

Generate and print your ABHA card for cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.

ABHA
Generate your ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) card for a unique health ID linked to all your medical records. Enables cashless treatment across India.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🔍

Eligibility Check

Check whether you and your family are eligible for the Ayushman Bharat scheme.

PM-JAY
We check your eligibility on the official PM-JAY portal using your Aadhaar or ration card number. The check is completely free and takes just a few minutes.
Enquire on WhatsApp

Identity & Documents

Aadhaar, PAN & Certificates

🪪

Aadhaar Enrollment & Update

New enrollment, name/address/mobile corrections, biometric updates at our authorised centre.

UIDAI
New Aadhaar enrollment for all age groups. Update name, address, date of birth, gender, mobile number, and email. Biometric update for residents above 5 and 15 years. Acknowledgement slip provided immediately.
Enquire on WhatsApp
📄

PAN Card Services

New PAN applications and corrections through NSDL/UTI portals.

Income Tax
Apply for a new PAN card or make corrections (name, date of birth, address). Application submitted through NSDL or UTI portal. e-PAN available for download within 48 hours. Physical card in 7–15 working days.
Enquire on WhatsApp
📜

Birth & Death Certificates

Official birth and death certificates through the civil registration portal.

State Govt.
Apply for birth and death certificates through the UP Civil Registration portal. Required documents: hospital discharge slip or local witness for birth; death report from hospital or doctor for death certificate.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🏛️

Caste, Income & Domicile

Caste, income, and domicile certificate applications through UP government portals.

UP Govt.
Apply for SC/ST/OBC caste certificate, annual income certificate, and UP domicile/residence certificate through the UP e-District portal. Aadhaar, family ration card, and local proof required.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🚗

Driving Licence Services

Learner's licence, DL renewal and RC-related services through the Parivahan portal.

Parivahan
Apply for a learner's licence, driving licence renewal, duplicate DL, and RC transfer through the Parivahan (MoRTH) portal. Aadhaar, existing DL (if any), and passport photo required.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🗳️

Voter ID Services

New voter ID registration, corrections and updates through the Election Commission portal.

ECI
Register as a new voter (Form 6), correct details on existing voter ID (Form 8), or update address (Form 8A) through the Election Commission's Voter Helpline portal. Aadhaar and address proof needed.
Enquire on WhatsApp
Digital Services

Other Services

💡

Utility Bill Payments

Electricity, water, gas bill payments and mobile/DTH recharges processed instantly.

Digital Seva
Pay electricity bills (PVVNL, UPPCL), water bills, gas bills, and do mobile/DTH recharges instantly. Instant digital receipt provided. Accepted for all UP electricity boards.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🎓

Scholarship Applications

State and central government scholarship applications for students of all categories.

Scholarship
Apply for UP post-matric scholarships, pre-matric scholarships, and central government scholarships for SC/ST/OBC/minority students. Documents: Aadhaar, income certificate, bank passbook, marksheets.
Enquire on WhatsApp
🍽️

Ration Card (FPS)

Ration card applications, corrections and NFSA services through UP Food department.

NFSA
Apply for new ration card, add/remove family members, correct name or address errors through UP Food and Civil Supplies department portal. Aadhaar of all family members required.
Enquire on WhatsApp
📮

DigiMail & eSign

Digital mail, eSign and other CSC Digital Seva services for paperless transactions.

Digital India
Use DigiMail for secure government communications and eSign for legally valid digital signatures on documents. Enables paperless processing for various government applications.
Enquire on WhatsApp

Reasons to Choose Us

What Makes Us Different

Every CSC centre offers services — but not every CSC centre offers trust, speed, and genuine care for the community.

🏆

Government Authorised & Certified

Akash CSC Centre is an officially certified Village Level Entrepreneur (VLE) under MeitY's CSC scheme. We hold 8 individual certifications including SBI BC, IIBF Advanced, UIDAI Aadhaar Operator, RAP Insurance, and ISB Entrepreneurship. Every service we offer is backed by official government authorisation — not just any shop claiming to do it.

✅ 8 Verified Certifications
🏦

Only Certified SBI BC Agent in Aimnabad

As a certified State Bank of India Business Correspondent (SBI BC), we are one of the very few authorised banking service points in Aimnabad and Sector-1, Greater Noida West. You can deposit, withdraw, open accounts, and transfer money — all without going to a bank branch. Safe, fast, and fully authorised by SBI.

🏦 SBI Authorised BC Point
🏥

Authorised Ayushman Bharat Operator

We are an officially registered PM-JAY operator for Ayushman Bharat registrations in Greater Noida West. Thousands of families in Aimnabad, Bisrakh, Sector-1 and nearby areas have received their Ayushman health cards through us — giving them access to ₹5 lakh free health coverage every year.

🏥 PM-JAY Registered Operator
📍

Locally Based — We Know Your Community

We are not a franchise or a corporate outlet. Akash CSC Centre is run by a local resident of Greater Noida West who understands the needs of the community — whether it is a farmer needing a Kisan Credit Card, a student applying for scholarship, or a senior citizen needing Aadhaar update help. We speak your language and understand your situation.

📍 Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West
🛡️

Certified Insurance Agent — RAP Cleared

Most CSC centres cannot legally sell insurance. We can — because we have cleared the Rural Agent Programme (RAP) exam from CSC, making us a certified insurance agent. We offer life insurance, health insurance, vehicle insurance, and PMFBY crop insurance — fully legally and transparently.

🛡️ RAP Certified Insurance Agent
💰

Loan Services Through CSC Loan Bazaar

Need a personal loan, home loan, or Kisan Credit Card? Through CSC Loan Bazaar, we connect you with multiple banks and NBFCs to get the best rate for your situation. We handle the entire paperwork and application process — you just need to bring your documents.

💰 CSC Loan Bazaar Authorised
⚡

Fast, Transparent & No Hidden Charges

We process all services at official government rates with no hidden fees. Aadhaar updates are done on the spot. PAN cards applied same day. We tell you the exact charge before we start — and we give you the acknowledgement slip or receipt for every single service.

⚡ Official Rates Only
📞

Always Reachable — WhatsApp Support

Tips, Guides & Updates

Blog & Helpful Tips

Useful guides on government services, schemes, and how to get things done quickly in Greater Noida West.

🏥
Ayushman Bharat

How to Get Your Ayushman Bharat Card in Greater Noida West

Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) gives eligible families up to ₹5 lakh free health coverage every year. Here is a step-by-step guide to check eligibility and get your card registered at Akash CSC Centre in Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West...

📅 May 2025⏱ 3 min read

What is Ayushman Bharat?
Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) is India's largest health insurance scheme. It provides free treatment up to ₹5 lakh per year at government and empanelled private hospitals for eligible families.

Who is Eligible?
Families listed in the SECC 2011 database are eligible. You can check eligibility using your Aadhaar number or ration card number on the official PM-JAY portal.

Documents Needed:

  • Aadhaar card (all family members)
  • Ration card
  • Mobile number linked to Aadhaar

How We Help:
Visit Akash CSC Centre at Shop No.3, KHS-782, Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West. We check your eligibility on the spot, complete registration, and generate your Ayushman health card — usually within 30 minutes. There is no government fee for this service.

📲 Book Appointment on WhatsApp
🪪
Aadhaar Services

Aadhaar Update in Greater Noida West — Everything You Need to Know

Need to update your name, address or mobile number on your Aadhaar card? As a UIDAI-authorised Aadhaar enrolment operator in Aimnabad, we can do it quickly and officially. Here is everything you need to know before visiting us...

📅 April 2025⏱ 4 min read

What Can Be Updated on Aadhaar?
You can update your name, date of birth, address, gender, mobile number, and email address. Biometric updates (fingerprints and iris) are also available for residents aged 5 and 15 years.

Documents Required for Address Update:

  • Any one valid address proof — passport, voter ID, driving licence, bank passbook, utility bill (not older than 3 months)
  • Original Aadhaar card

Documents Required for Name Update:

  • PAN card, passport, or gazette notification
  • Original Aadhaar card

How Long Does It Take?
The update request is submitted on the spot and you receive an acknowledgement slip immediately. UIDAI processes the update within 7–15 working days. You can track status using the URN on the slip.

Visit Us:
Akash CSC Centre, Shop No.3, KHS-782, Dhyan Singh Bhati Road, Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West — 201318.

📲 WhatsApp for Aadhaar Update
🏦
Banking

Open a Zero-Balance SBI Account in Aimnabad Without Visiting the Bank

Did you know you can open an SBI Jan Dhan zero-balance account right here in Aimnabad without going to an SBI branch? As a certified SBI Business Correspondent, Akash CSC Centre brings banking services to your doorstep in Greater Noida West...

📅 March 2025⏱ 3 min read

What is Jan Dhan Account?
Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) accounts are zero-balance savings accounts with a RuPay debit card, accident insurance of ₹1 lakh, and overdraft facility up to ₹10,000.

Documents Required:

  • Aadhaar card (mandatory)
  • PAN card (if available) or Form 60
  • One passport-size photograph
  • Mobile number

Time Required: Account opening takes approximately 20–30 minutes at our centre. You receive the passbook and RuPay card details on the spot.

Other SBI Services at Our Centre:
Cash deposit, withdrawal, balance enquiry, mini statement, AEPS fund transfer — all available without visiting the bank branch.

📲 Enquire on WhatsApp
📜
Documents & Certificates

Caste, Income & Domicile Certificate — How to Apply in Greater Noida West

Caste certificate, income certificate, and domicile certificate are required for scholarships, government jobs, and many other purposes. Here is how to apply for them easily through Akash CSC Centre in Sector-1, Greater Noida West...

📅 February 2025⏱ 4 min read

Which Certificates Do We Process?
We process all certificates through the UP e-District portal — caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC), income certificate, domicile/residence certificate, birth certificate, and death certificate.

Documents for Caste Certificate:

  • Aadhaar card
  • Ration card
  • Father's caste certificate (if available)
  • Self-declaration form

Documents for Income Certificate:

  • Aadhaar card
  • Self-declaration of income
  • Ration card

Processing Time: Applications are submitted online through the official portal immediately. Government processing takes 7–21 working days depending on the certificate type.

📲 Apply via WhatsApp
💰
Loan Services

How to Apply for a Personal or Business Loan Through CSC Loan Bazaar

Need funds for business, home, or personal use? Through CSC Loan Bazaar at Akash CSC Centre in Aimnabad, Greater Noida West, you can apply for loans from multiple banks at competitive rates with minimal documentation...

📅 January 2025⏱ 3 min read

What Loans Are Available?
Through CSC Loan Bazaar, you can apply for personal loans, home loans, business/MSME loans, Kisan Credit Cards (KCC), and loan against property — through multiple partner banks and NBFCs.

Basic Eligibility:

  • Age: 21–65 years
  • Stable income source (salaried or self-employed)
  • Good CIBIL score (650+)

Documents Needed:

  • Aadhaar card
  • PAN card
  • Last 3 months bank statements
  • Income proof (salary slip or ITR)

Process: We fill the application on the CSC Loan Bazaar portal, submit your documents, and track the status. The bank processes and disburses directly to your account.

📲 Check Loan Eligibility
🎓
Scholarships

Government Scholarships for Students in UP — Apply Through Akash CSC Centre

Are you a student from SC, ST, OBC or minority community in Uttar Pradesh? You may be eligible for state and central government scholarships. Here is how to apply quickly through our CSC centre in Greater Noida West...

📅 December 2024⏱ 3 min read

Scholarships We Process:

  • UP Pre-Matric Scholarship (Class 9–10)
  • UP Post-Matric Scholarship (Class 11 onwards)
  • National Scholarship Portal (NSP) scholarships
  • Minority community scholarships (Maulana Azad)

Documents Required:

  • Aadhaar card (student)
  • Caste certificate
  • Income certificate
  • Bank passbook (student's account)
  • Previous year marksheet
  • Current year admission/fee receipt

Important: Scholarship portals open for a limited window each year (usually August–October). Visit us early to avoid missing the deadline.

📲 Apply for Scholarship

Help & FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common queries about our services, timings, and how we can help you.

What is a CSC Centre (Common Service Centre)?+

A Common Service Centre (CSC) is a government-authorised digital service delivery point under MeitY, providing citizens access to government e-services, banking, insurance and digital services in one place. Akash CSC Centre is an officially certified CSC point serving Greater Noida West.

What are your working hours?+

We are open Monday to Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. On Sundays we are open from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM for urgent services. You can also WhatsApp us at +91 7209825995 for any enquiries.

How do I apply for Ayushman Bharat (PMJAY) card?+

Bring your Aadhaar card and ration card (or other eligible documents). We check your eligibility on the official PM-JAY portal and, if eligible, process your registration and generate your health card. There is no government fee for registration — you pay only the nominal CSC service charge.

Can I withdraw or deposit cash here for my SBI account?+

Yes! As a certified SBI Business Correspondent, we offer cash deposit, withdrawal, balance enquiry, mini statements, and AEPS fund transfers for SBI account holders. Please bring your Aadhaar card and registered mobile number.

What documents do I need to open a bank account?+

For opening an SBI savings or Jan Dhan account: Aadhaar card (mandatory), PAN card or Form 60, one passport-size photograph, and your mobile number. We guide you through the entire process.

How can I apply for a loan through your centre?+

We process loans through CSC Loan Bazaar, connecting borrowers with banks and NBFCs. You can apply for personal, home, business, and Kisan Credit Card loans. Common documents needed: Aadhaar, PAN, income proof, and bank statements.

What insurance policies can I get here?+

As a certified insurance agent who cleared the RAP exam from CSC, we offer life insurance, health insurance, general insurance (vehicle, travel), and PMFBY crop insurance for farmers. We help you compare and choose the right plan for your needs.

How long does Aadhaar or PAN card take?+

Aadhaar updates are processed at the centre immediately — acknowledgement slip given on the spot, updated Aadhaar available within 7–15 working days from UIDAI. PAN card applications are submitted to NSDL/UTI and delivered within 7–15 working days. An e-PAN can be downloaded sooner.

Are your service charges the official government rates?+

Yes. All government services have prescribed fee structures set by the respective departments. We charge only the official service fee plus the regulated CSC service charge. No hidden fees. Verify anytime on the official CSC Digital Seva portal.

How do I reach your centre?+

We are at Shop No.3, Plot No.2, KHS-782, Dhyan Singh Bhati Road, Aimnabad, Sector-1, Greater Noida West, UP – 201318. Call or WhatsApp us on +91 7209825995 for directions. See the map on our Contact page.

Still have questions?

Reach out on WhatsApp — we usually respond within minutes.
